description_long: This doll depicts a small humanoid figure with a pale complexion, dressed in an elaborate, traditional-style outfit dominated by shades of blue, purple, and pink. The doll wears a large, round hat adorned with a pom-pom and a prominent paper talisman attached to the front, reminiscent of East Asian folklore. Its clothing features wide sleeves, decorative knots, and layered garments with intricate patterns, including a bow and ornamental beads. The figure has long, braided lavender hair that extends down the back, ending in a ribbon and a spherical ornament. The face is delicately painted with large, expressive eyes and a neutral expression, while the hands are outstretched to the sides. The overall design is highly stylized, with a fantasy or anime-inspired aesthetic.
description: A highly detailed, stylized doll in ornate blue and purple traditional attire, featuring a large hat, braided hair, and decorative accessories.
description_view_0: Front view shows the doll's face, talisman on the hat, outstretched arms, and detailed front of the outfit.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the hat, the length of the braid, and the layered clothing.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the full braid, back bow, and the symmetrical design of the cape and ornaments.
description_view_3: Right side view reveals the side of the face, the trailing braid, and the side details of the outfit.
attribute_clothing_style: Traditional East Asian-inspired attire with a large blue and purple hat featuring a pom-pom and talisman, wide-sleeved robe with decorative knots, layered garments, a pink bow, and ornamental beads, all in a fantasy or anime style.
attribute_pose: Standing upright with arms extended outward at shoulder height, legs together, head facing forward, and torso straight. The braid hangs down the back, and the hands are open and relaxed.
attribute_facial_expression: Neutral expression with slightly parted lips, large open eyes, and relaxed eyebrows, conveying a calm demeanor.
attribute_hair_style: Long, straight, lavender hair styled in a single thick braid down the back, with short bangs framing the face.
